text.title: Grafana — Basics Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Dashboard deleted by accident; nobody can restore.
antipattern.fix: Migrate to JSON/Grafonnet in Git; provision from there.

antipattern.symptom: Stage rebuild loses datasource; alerts fail.
Alert silenced by ops; never restored.
antipattern.fix: Author rules as Grafana alerting YAML; PR review required.

antipattern.symptom: 200 dashboards in root; nobody finds anything.
antipattern.fix: Allocate folders per team/product with RBAC.
